nasb.text: and when the Egyptians see you, they will say, ‘This is his wife’; and they will kill me, but they will let you live.

esv.text: and when the Egyptians see you, they will say, ‘This is his wife.’ Then they will kill me, but they will let you live.

cnv.text: 埃及人看見你的時候，必會說：‘這是他的妻子’，他們就會殺我，卻叫你活著。

ccb.text: 埃及人看见你，一定会因为你是我的妻子而杀了我，让你活着。

csbs.text: 埃及人看见你的时候，就会说‘这是他的妻子’，然后杀了我，却让你存活。
